name: Bao la Kiswahili
author: AGP
description: Bao la Kiswahili, the Zanzibari / East-African four-row Mancala — widely held to be the deepest traditional mancala in the world. Introduce seeds one by one (namua), capture the opposite front-row pit and re-enter the loot at a head pit (kichwa), guard your house (nyumba) and unleash it at the right moment (safari). Empty your opponent's front row or leave them without a move to win. De Voogt master rules; a beginners' ruleset (kujifunza) is included as an option.
